ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: By the night when it covers
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: By the night when it covers,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the day when it appears
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the day when it shines!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] He who created the male and female,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And by ˹the One˺ Who created male and female!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, your efforts are diverse.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely the ends you strive for are diverse.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: As for he who gives and fears Allah
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: As for the one who is charitable, mindful ˹of Allah˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And believes in the best [reward],
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and ˹firmly˺ believes in the finest reward,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We will ease him toward ease.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We will facilitate for them the Way of Ease.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And as for the one who is stingy, indifferent ˹to Allah˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And denies the best [reward],
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and ˹staunchly˺ denies the finest reward,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We will ease him toward difficulty.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We will facilitate for them the path of hardship.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama yughnee AAanhu maluhu itha taradda
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And their wealth will be of no benefit to them when they tumble ˹into Hell˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: It is certainly upon Us ˹alone˺ to show ˹the way to˺ guidance.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And surely to Us ˹alone˺ belong this life and the next.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And so I have warned you of a raging Fire,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: in which none will burn except the most wretched—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who had denied and turned away.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who deny and turn away.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But the righteous one will avoid it -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But the righteous will be spared from it—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who donate ˹some of˺ their wealth only to purify themselves,

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعۡمَةٖ تُجۡزَىٰٓ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama liahadin AAindahu min niAAmatin tujza
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: not in return for someone’s favours,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: but seeking the pleasure of their Lord, the Most High.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And he is going to be satisfied.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They will certainly be pleased.
